languages.text: {n}Иждриг бросает на вас исполненный ярости взгляд, но тут же берет себя в руки. Когда он оборачивается на Себериана, на его лице появляется что-то, отдаленно напоминающее смирение.{/n} "Был не прав, приношу извинения. Вы сделали наш полк таким, каков он сейчас. А это дорогого стоит. Будьте уверены, вашу спину я прикрою".

{n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг бросает на вас исполненный ярости взгляд, но тут же берет себя в руки. Когда он оборачивается на Себериана, на его лице появляется что-то, отдаленно напоминающее смирение.{/n} "Был не прав, приношу извинения. Вы сделали наш полк таким, каков он сейчас. А это дорогого стоит. Будьте уверены, вашу спину я прикрою".

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, then immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I was wrong. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

{n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, then immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I was wrong. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

{n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

{n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig wirft dir einen wütenden Blick zu, fasst sich aber sofort wieder. Als er sich Seberian zuwendet, wirkt er zerknirscht.{/n} "Meine Bemerkung war unpassend. Es tut mir leid. Ihr habt unser Regiment zu dem gemacht, was es heute ist. Das ist etwas wert. Ich versichere Euch, ich werde Euch den Rücken freihalten."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig wirft dir einen wütenden Blick zu, fasst sich aber sofort wieder. Als er sich Seberian zuwendet, wirkt er zerknirscht.{/n} "Meine Bemerkung war unpassend. Es tut mir leid. Ihr habt unser Regiment zu dem gemacht, was es heute ist. Das ist etwas wert. Ich versichere Euch, ich werde Euch den Rücken freihalten."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig vous lance un regard furieux, mais se reprend immédiatement. Quand il se tourne vers Seberian, vous remarquez un léger remords sur son visage.{/n} « Mes paroles ont dépassé ma pensée. Je vous présente mes excuses. Sans vous, notre régiment ne serait pas ce qu'il est aujourd'hui, et ce n'est pas rien. Vous pouvez compter sur ma protection. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig vous lance un regard furieux, mais se reprend immédiatement. Quand il se tourne vers Seberian, vous remarquez un léger remords sur son visage.{/n} « Mes paroles ont dépassé ma pensée. Je vous présente mes excuses. Sans vous, notre régiment ne serait pas ce qu'il est aujourd'hui, et ce n'est pas rien. Vous pouvez compter sur ma protection. »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig te mira con furia, pero recupera la compostura al instante. Cuando se gira hacia Seberian, ves en su rostro algo que podrían ser remordimientos.{/n} «Me he extralimitado. Lo lamento. Hizo de nuestro regimiento lo que es hoy. Eso vale algo. Le aseguro que vigilaré sus espaldas».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig te mira con furia, pero recupera la compostura al instante. Cuando se gira hacia Seberian, ves en su rostro algo que podrían ser remordimientos.{/n} «Me he extralimitado. Lo lamento. Hizo de nuestro regimiento lo que es hoy. Eso vale algo. Le aseguro que vigilaré sus espaldas».

languages.text: {n}İzdrig sana öfkeli bir bakış atsa da hemen toparlanıyor. Seberian'a döndüğündeyse yüzünde pişmanlığa benzer bir ifade beliriyor.{/n} "Sıramı beklemeden konuştum. Özür dilerim. Alayımızı bugünkü hâline getiren sizsiniz. Bunun bir değeri var. Emin olun, arkanızı kollayacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig sana öfkeli bir bakış atsa da hemen toparlanıyor. Seberian'a döndüğündeyse yüzünde pişmanlığa benzer bir ifade beliriyor.{/n} "Sıramı beklemeden konuştum. Özür dilerim. Alayımızı bugünkü hâline getiren sizsiniz. Bunun bir değeri var. Emin olun, arkanızı kollayacağım."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格愤怒地瞥了你一眼，但立刻收敛情绪。等他转向塞贝里安时，脸上浮现出近乎愧疚的表情。{/n}“是我多嘴了，我道歉。我们团能有今天，全仰仗您。这份情谊不轻。您放心，我定会保护您。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格愤怒地瞥了你一眼，但立刻收敛情绪。等他转向塞贝里安时，脸上浮现出近乎愧疚的表情。{/n}“是我多嘴了，我道歉。我们团能有今天，全仰仗您。这份情谊不轻。您放心，我定会保护您。”

languages.text: {n}イズドリーグは怒った顔で君を見つめたが、すぐに落ち着きを取り戻した。そしてセベリアンに向き直ると、謝罪の様な表情が浮かんだ。{/n}「失礼なことを言った。謝る。君のおかげで、我々の連隊は今日に至る。それは価値がある。安心しろ、君の背中は守る。」
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig casts a furious glance at you, but immediately composes himself. When he turns to Seberian, something resembling contrition appears on his face.{/n} "I spoke out of turn. I apologise. You made our regiment what it is today. That is worth something. Be assured, I shall guard your back."
